query:
-- Count of hot projects with zero send_ready, grouped by enrichment outcome
SELECT 
  COALESCE(c.enrichmentStatus, 'no_contacts_at_all') as enrichment_outcome,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as project_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT cp2.projectId 
    FROM contactProjects cp2 
    JOIN contacts c2 ON c2.id = cp2.contactId 
    WHERE c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  )
GROUP BY COALESCE(c.enrichmentStatus, 'no_contacts_at_all')
ORDER BY project_count DESC;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Count of hot projects with zero send_ready, grouped by enrichment outcome
SELECT 
  COALESCE(c.enrichmentStatus, 'no_contacts_at_all') as enrichment_outcome,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as project_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT cp2.projectId 
    FROM contactProjects cp2 
    JOIN contacts c2 ON c2.id = cp2.contactId 
    WHERE c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  )
GROUP BY COALESCE(c.enrichmentStatus, 'no_contacts_at_all')
ORDER BY project_count DESC;
